title: rubus commersonii
intro: Rubus commersonii, also known as the Tahitian black raspberry, is a species of thorny shrub native to the Pacific Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus commersonii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
